title: USB Heaters, Portable Coffee Tea Warmers, USB Wood Grain Cup Heaters, Electric Mug Heated Coasters MR Coffee Mug Warmers Wireless Charger for Desk Office Home Use
features: ☕【USB Heater】 : This moisture-proof heating Coffee Warmer is powered by equipment with 5V USB output port, such as your computer, desktop, laptop, tablet, mobile power, etc. When the USB heater is working, do not touch the electric heating panel to prevent burns.

☕【18W Electric Heater】 : Our 18W low electric heater can keep the beverage hot and cold. Keep coffee, tea or other hot drink at 55 ° C, not worry about high temperature and high oxidation, safe use. It can only keep warm, not suitable for heating and very hot drinks or coffee.

☕【Suitable for Flat Cups】 : This is designed for a flat cup, make sure that the bottom of the Mug Warmer is completely contacted. Not suitable for mineral water bottles, hot cups, bottom or pits too thick cups. Suitable for most stainless steel cups, baby bottles, ceramic cups, glass, etc.
☕【Lightweight and Portable 】: Coffee Cup Warmer is light weight, compact size, easy to carry, suitable for family and office use, can always keep a warm drink.
☕【Premium Material 】: Its adopts high quality WOOD + METAL material, in heating, easy to wipe clean. Desktop Coffee Warmer equipped with a USB cable, no battery, plug and play, very convenient.
description: Product Description Coffee Warmer USB Mug Warmer Beverage/Drink/Tea Warmer for Office/Home Use Coffee warmer meeting the full range of modern family needs, coffee cup warmer keeps suitable temperature for coffee, milk, water and other beverages all day long! Products are small stylish,great enough satisfy the user's needs and keeping warms. Tips: Coffee drinking properly temperature is beneficial to your health. Drink a hot coffee anytime, anywhere, you can make you feel relaxed and happy. With this USB heater, you can have more comfortable life in various occasions. Multi-Purpose Convenient This cup warmer mat is made of high quality walnut wood and metal materials, heating evenly, safe and durable to use, has natural walnut wooden grain and smooth to touch. easy and convenient. It powered by any devices with output 5V USB port, such as your computer, desktop, laptop, tablet, mobile power and so on, The maximum temperature is up to 80 degrees. The surface on this USB mug warmer is very easy to clean. All you need to do is use a damp wet cloth to wipe down the surface and it is good to go. Suitable for Heating suitable for different sized cups, make sure your cup is flat and the cup heater can touch the bottom, do not use plastic cups or double vacuum (for flat ceramic cups, glass cups, paper cups, stainless steel cups , milk bottles) At home/In office Whether you're working in the office or relaxing at home, it will provide you with a warm drink whenever you need it, making you more relaxed and happier. Easy to carry The compact design allows you to carry it easily. You can take it to the coffee shop or to a picnic. Even if you stay up late and work late, you don't have to worry about your coffee getting cold. Exquisite Gifts Show your family and friends how much you love them on Thanksgiving, Father's Day, Mother's Day, Christmas, Valentine's Day and more!
